# Utensils

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Utensils;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Utensils { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
fork, knife, cutlery, flatware, tableware, silverware, food, restaurant, meal, breakfast, dinner, supper

## Categories
food-beverage, travel, navigation

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/utensils)
